n_antenna_dl.description: Number of Antennas for each of the cells configured. Examples: enable both cells and set to 2 to do MIMO 2x2 with Carrier Aggregation, enable one cell and set to 4 to do MIMO 4x4.

n_antenna_ul.description: Number of Antennas for each of the cells configured. Examples: enable both cells and set to 2 to do MIMO 2x2 with Carrier Aggregation, enable one cell and set to 4 to do MIMO 4x4.

plmn_list_5g.description: List of PLMNs broadcasted by the gNodeB, at most 12 (default: PLMN 00101 and TAC 1)
